channel.title: homework on mahmood
channel.description: Recent content in homework on mahmood

item.title: networking homework 3
item.description: \(\DeclareMathOperator{\spn}{span}\) \(\DeclareMathOperator{\dom}{domain}\) \(\DeclareMathOperator{\ran}{range}\) \(\DeclareMathOperator{\rng}{range}\) \(\DeclareMathOperator{\img}{Im}\) \(\DeclareMathOperator{\adj}{adj}\) \(\newcommand\dif[1]{\:\textrm{d}#1}\) \(\DeclarePairedDelimiter\ceil{\lceil}{\rceil}\) \(\DeclarePairedDelimiter\floor{\lfloor}{\rfloor}\) 1 question group 1 given a non-persistant connection between a webserver and a client, how can the client know that it has received the full response from the server without inspecting the response message itself? assume a connection between a webserver and a client through a proxy, such that the client opens an http connection with the proxy and the proxy opens one with the server that holds the desired object.
